task_statement: P7 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair (product route / Easy Building surface) - bounded slice 1 corrected fan-out/fan-in rerun: fix install/init/onboard public-route doc drift, clarify graph-packet vs full Building Plan, remove raw str(exc) operator leakage with a product-safe taxonomy, record bare brick default, and pin against regression, through the official brick build graph route. Full Easy-Building dynamic design ergonomics is a later slice.
selection_rule: manual graph because P7 is a product/doc/CLI projection boundary repair; P7a partial linear run showed same scope but wrong topology, so this rerun preserves the same P7 slice while using work -> fan(QA) -> closure fan-in.

nodes.work_statement:
Design the corrected P7 product-route surface slice from the P7 phase doc, S6 audit refs, and partial P7a evidence. Derive exact files/lines to change and the checker-first negative pin shape. Note that P7a was a same-scope but linear/partial run; use it as support evidence only. Return design only; no source edits.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P7 product-route surface slice ONLY. In-scope: (a) fix install/init/onboard doc drift so public route names brick init/status/doctor/build/build --graph and does not present the onboard module seam as a separate customer route; (b) clarify graph-packet vs full Building Plan in quickstart so a compact graph packet is not shown as run_building_plan internals; (c) CLI error surface must not leak raw str(exc)/traceback to the operator surface - map to a product-safe error taxonomy/category while keeping evidence in JSON/debug; (d) decide and record bare `brick` default behavior (status) at first-use docs; (e) add a checker-first negative pin so the onboard-module-as-route drift and raw str(exc) leakage cannot silently return. Do NOT revive --large, do NOT add a new engine, do NOT build the full Easy-Building dynamic design ergonomics (that is a later P7 slice, record as not_proven). Do not broaden into P8 ship safety or P9 dynamic proof. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; no QA source mutation. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Implement the P7 product-route surface slice using P7a partial work as support evidence only. Required outcomes:
(1) README.md and support/docs/references/{quickstart.md,setup.md,launch-guide.md}: replace the onboard-module seam (uv run python3 -m brick_protocol.support.operator.onboard codex / brick onboard / stale "5) 설치 점검 완료") with the official public route (brick init / brick status / brick doctor / brick build / brick build --graph). doctor stays reachable via brick doctor. Do not present a second customer execution route.
(2) quickstart.md: keep brick build --graph compact-packet example, and clearly separate or remove the immediately-following run_building_plan full-Building-Plan example so a compact graph packet is not confused with internal plan internals.
(3) support/operator/cli.py main() error handler: stop leaking raw str(exc) as the primary operator-facing message. Emit a product-safe category/taxonomy (use shared failure attribution taxonomy where it fits) plus evidence pointers; keep raw detail only in JSON/debug evidence, not the plain operator line.
(4) Record bare `brick` (no args) default as status in first-use docs.
(5) Add a checker-first negative pin in brick_cli_entrypoint profile and/or kernel check so reintroducing the onboard-module-as-route doc drift or raw str(exc) operator leak goes RED.
Run focused brick_cli_entrypoint profile, py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all. Return changed_files, exact command rc outcomes, and not_proven (include full Easy-Building dynamic design ergonomics as not_proven/deferred).

Code attack QA for the P7 slice. Verify: public docs no longer present the onboard module seam as a customer route; quickstart no longer blurs compact graph packet with full Building Plan; cli.py main() does not surface raw str(exc) as the primary operator line; bare brick default is documented as status; the negative pin RED-fires when drift/leak is reintroduced; changed files are inside P7 scope; --large/new engine not revived. Probe_write only. Return local concern targeting work if implementation_gap remains.

Final P7 slice closure. Fan in work and all three QA bodies. Report observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta / parent_goal_delta_status / next_target_candidates. Done condition for THIS slice: onboard-module-as-route doc drift removed; graph-packet vs full-plan blur clarified; raw str(exc) operator leak removed with product-safe taxonomy; bare brick default recorded; negative pin prevents regression; focused profile and check_profile.py --all agree. Full Easy-Building dynamic design ergonomics (S6-F4) remains an explicitly named remaining P7 slice in not_proven/remaining_delta. If implementation/boundary/evidence gap remains, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting work. Do not claim whole goal/customer-ready complete.

P7 slice closure does not prove the full Easy-Building ergonomics, P8 ship safety, P9 dynamic proof, or customer-ready whole goal
checker green is support evidence only
P7a partial evidence is support evidence only and was not closure proof
